items.title: McDONALD'S ANNOUNCES QUARTERLY CASH DIVIDEND
items.description: Today, McDonald's Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.86 per share of common stock payable on March 17, 2026 to shareholders of record at the close of business on March 3, 2026.

items.title: McDonald's (MCD) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
items.description: McDonald's (MCD) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

items.title: Arcos Dorados to Participate in Upcoming Investor Event
items.description: MONTEVIDEO, Uruguay, February 04, 2026--Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) ("Arcos Dorados" or the "Company"), Latin America’s largest restaurant chain and the world’s largest independent McDonald’s franchisee, today announced its participation in the following investor event:

items.title: China’s big food chains retreat from deep discounts – report
items.description: The move signal a departure from the long-running price battles that hit restaurants, teahouses and cafés.

items.title: Loek Beckers named CFO of McDonald’s USA
items.description: The chain also promoted Luis Quintiliano to U.S. National Field president, while Tom Dillon will rotate into the senior vice president, corporate finance role
